title: CMR Extensions
text: Use cmr_stratified() main-wave allocation adapt across known target-population strata. strata_share input describe target population shares, realized pilot composition. pi_matrix gives total assignment share treatment/control stratum cell. sampling_margin gives total sample share assigned stratum, treatment_margin gives treatment share within stratum.
code: set.seed(506)  n_per_cell <- 100 strata <- rep(c("urban", "rural"), each = 2 * n_per_cell) d <- rep(c(rep(1, n_per_cell), rep(0, n_per_cell)), times = 2) y <- c(   rbeta(n_per_cell, shape1 = 2, shape2 = 5),   rbeta(n_per_cell, shape1 = 4, shape2 = 4),   rbeta(n_per_cell, shape1 = 3, shape2 = 6),   rbeta(n_per_cell, shape1 = 5, shape2 = 4) ) strata_share <- c(urban = 0.55, rural = 0.45)  fit_strata <- cmr_stratified(   y = y,   d = d,   strata = strata,   strata_share = strata_share,   alpha = 0.05,   method = "bounded" )  round(fit_strata$pi_matrix, 3) #>   urban rural #> 1 0.275 0.220 #> 0 0.278 0.227 round(fit_strata$sampling_margin, 3) #> urban rural  #> 0.553 0.447 round(fit_strata$treatment_margin, 3) #> urban rural  #> 0.498 0.492 fit_strata$U_CMR #> [1] 0.2281025

title: Proxy Outcomes

code: set.seed(404)  n_pilot <- 200 d <- rbinom(n_pilot, size = 1, prob = 0.5)  primary <- numeric(n_pilot) primary[d == 1] <- rbeta(sum(d == 1), shape1 = 6, shape2 = 3) primary[d == 0] <- rbeta(sum(d == 0), shape1 = 3.5, shape2 = 3.5)  proxy_noise <- ifelse(d == 1, 0.06, 0.08) * rnorm(n_pilot) proxy_y <- pmin(1, pmax(0, primary + proxy_noise))  round(rbind(   proxy_treatment = c(mean = mean(proxy_y[d == 1]), variance = var(proxy_y[d == 1])),   proxy_control = c(mean = mean(proxy_y[d == 0]), variance = var(proxy_y[d == 0])) ), 4) #>                   mean variance #> proxy_treatment 0.6606   0.0240 #> proxy_control   0.4783   0.0272

title: Print and summarize CMR results — print.cmr_two_arm
code: set.seed(13) d <- rep(c(1, 0), each = 20) y <- c(rbeta(20, 2, 6), rbeta(20, 4, 4)) fit <- cmr_two_arm(y, d) print(fit) #> <cmr_two_arm> #>   pi: 0.5 #>   U_CMR: 0.25 #>   method: bounded #>   n: 40 summary(fit) #> <summary.cmr_two_arm> #>   pi: 0.5 #>   U_CMR: 0.25 #>   method: bounded #>   n: 40

title: Two-arm confidence rectangles — rectangle_bernoulli_binary
text: y Pilot outcomes. d Pilot treatment indicator; treatment 1 control 0. alpha Target joint error level. beta Optional endpoint error allocation. title: Two-arm confidence rectangles — rectangle_bernoulli_binary

title: Multi-arm confidence rectangle — rectangle_multiarm
text: y Pilot outcomes. arm Pilot arm labels. control arm identified control_arm internally standardized "0". alpha Target joint error level. method Confidence-set method. NULL, Bonferroni error split across lower upper arm endpoints. scalar, matrix, named vector allocation may also supplied. control_arm Label identifying control arm arm. normalize TRUE, normalize bounded outcomes [0, 1] computing variances. lower, upper Optional lower upper outcome bounds used normalize = TRUE. na.rm TRUE, drop rows missing y arm. tol Numerical tolerance exact Bernoulli bound inversion.

title: Multiple-outcome confidence rectangle — rectangle_multiple_outcomes

code: rectangle_multiple_outcomes(   y,   d,   weights = NULL,   estimand = c("coprimary", "index"),   alpha = 0.05,   method = c("auto", "bounded", "bernoulli", "maurer_pontil", "mp", "bernoulli_exact",     "martinez_taboada_ramdas", "mtr"),   beta = NULL,   na.rm = TRUE,   tol = 1e-11 )

title: Multiple-outcome confidence rectangle — rectangle_multiple_outcomes

title: Proxy or delayed-outcome confidence rectangle — rectangle_proxy
text: proxy_y Pilot proxy delayed-primary outcomes. d Pilot treatment indicator; treatment 1 control 0. zeta Nonnegative standard-deviation bridge radius.
